# Backordered Items

In the context of [[order_management]], a backordered item is indicated on the order page with an estimated restock date. Customers are only charged when the backordered item ships, and they have the option to remove it from the order prior to shipping without impacting the remaining items in the order.

[Source: order_management.md#backordered-items]
